description_long: A muscular adult male figure stands with arms extended horizontally, dressed in a sleeveless, form-fitting top and matching pants. He wears fingerless gloves, a wide belt, and tall boots, all coordinated with his outfit. A long, flowing scarf is draped around his neck and trails dramatically behind him, adding a sense of motion. His hair is styled in thick, spiky locks, and a headband wraps around his forehead. The figure's physique is highly defined, with prominent muscles visible on the arms, chest, and abdomen. The overall appearance is that of a stylized, athletic character, possibly inspired by action or adventure genres.
description: A muscular adult male in a sleeveless outfit with gloves, boots, and a long trailing scarf, featuring spiky hair and a headband.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muscular build, sleeveless top, gloves, boots, and the scarf draped over the left shoulder.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the trailing scarf, and the definition of the arm and leg muscles.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back muscles, the scarf flowing behind, and the full length of the boots and gloves.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the scarf trailing, arm and leg definition, and the side profile of the head and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top, matching pants, fingerless gloves, wide belt, tall boots, long scarf, headband
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
